summary: We are sprinting to launch the China Going Global report and Intelligent China program by early September, with Asia Start SEO and social media agency selection demanding immediate attention this week.
summaryDetail: The team is deep in execution on three major initiatives. First, the China Going Global report (jointly with IE) is our flagship: Felix's one-pager proposal is due, the bulk translation is underway, and we need to confirm launch events at Tech in Asia and Tyson conferences in Singapore. Second, the Intelligent China program targeting foreigners is live with its webpage this week, and we must decide on the campaign approach. Third, Asia Start is running two parallel routes (AI vs traditional) for its first month, while SEO prioritization has shifted to focus on Asia Star and Intelligent China over US partnerships. Urgent this week: Joseph needs to deliver the Google Analytics conversion tracking brief and the initial SEO list, Julie must provide menu categorization feedback and send the Asia Start spotlight article, and Jimmy needs to adjust the Shun Tian Shu press release. Additionally, the social media agency selection is in motion—all four agencies have been invited, and Media Minds is prioritized due to budget and timeline. Upcoming next week: the team must finalize the report draft version for Erica's approval, publish the new campus press release, and begin discussions on Professor Zhu Rui's new book.

meetings.title: SEO & Program Prioritization Meeting
meetings.summary: Team discusses SEO strategy to rank for programs in China, prioritizing Asia Star and Intelligent China programs over US partnerships, and reviews Google Analytics conversion tracking setup.

meetings.title: Marketing Team Meeting - June 29, 2026
meetings.summary: Team discussed feedback on menu categorization, brochure updates, social media agency search, and IE report translation. Decisions made on Shun Tian Shu press release approach and prioritizing Media Minds for social media.

meetings.title: New Chinese Playbook Report Planning
meetings.summary: Team discusses joint report with CKGSB on Chinese companies globalizing to Southeast Asia, including op-eds, case studies, and launch events at Tech in Asia and Tyson conferences in Singapore.

meetings.title: Asia Start & New Program Planning
meetings.summary: Reviewed Asia Start campaign with two routes (AI vs traditional) and discussed new 'Intelligent China' program targeting foreigners, with modules in Beijing, Shanghai, and Shenzhen.

meetings.title: China-Europe Cooperation Discussion
meetings.summary: Discussion on China-Europe relations, focusing on geopolitical tensions, de-risking, and the role of companies versus governments in market operations.

decisions.text: Prioritize Asia Star and Intelligent China programs over US partnerships for initial SEO efforts.
Intelligent China webpage will be ready this week; Asia Star page already live.
Shun Tian Shu press release will be one article, either incorporating 10 points or turning into 10-point article.
Prioritize Media Minds as social media agency due to small budget and time constraints.
Report will be jointly published by CKGSB and IE, with main research from Leeway and op-eds from both schools' leadership and alumni.
Working title: 'The New Chinese Playbook for Going Global'.
Target completion by early September for launch at Singapore events.
Asia Start campaign will run two parallel routes for the first month: AI and traditional.
Intelligent China program targets foreigners, is in English, and focuses on module one (Beijing) initially.
Use Flow for design of China Going Global report for flexibility
Invite all four agencies (Impactable, Media Minds Global, 麦炽科技, 省广) to participate in social media ad agency selection
decisions.meetingTitle: Re: Request for Proposal - social media ad agency 2026 - updated 0703

decisions.text: Use Temu as second case study for IE report instead of halocoko
Place key findings at the beginning of the IE report
